scope: plaintext writer-side vectors executable through public RAO writer APIs

cases.fault: two payload entries share the same path
two payload entries share the same REMANENCE.file_id
manifest file_id collides with a payload file_id
payload path uses the reserved _remanence namespace
payload path contains an ASCII control character
payload path is absolute
payload path contains a parent-directory component
payload path contains a dot component
payload path contains an empty component
regular-file path ends in slash
mtime is not POSIX pax decimal seconds
streamed payload bytes do not match declared file_sha256
streamed payload ends before declared size_bytes
chunk_size is not a positive multiple of 512
symlink entry declares a nonzero payload size
directory entry declares a nonzero payload size
symlink entry omits link_target
hardlink entry omits link_target
hardlink target names a directory entry, not a regular primary
hardlink target appears after the hardlink entry
directory entry path does not end in slash
